name: berate-ap
title: berate-ap
summary: Script for orchestrating mana rogue Wi-Fi Access Points
description:
Script for orchestrating mana rogue Wi-Fi Access Points
This package contains a script for orchestrating mana rogue Wi-Fi Access
Points. It can also handle regular hostapd AP and create AP easily.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use berate_ap because Script for orchestrating mana rogue Wi-Fi Access Points.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use berate_ap as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `berate_ap [options] [args]` as documented upstream for berate_ap.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair berate_ap with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `berate_ap --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
